summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WaveWatch iteration 11 fixes - all major features working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Music item click does not navigate to detail page

passed_tests: All backend APIs (18/18) returning correct status codes
Admin page TV tab shows channels from DB correctly
Admin page Music tab shows music items from DB
Admin page Software tab shows software items from DB
Admin page Ebooks tab shows ebook items from DB
Admin page Games tab shows game items from DB
Admin page Codes tab (vipcodes) allows generating VIP codes
Admin page Modules tab toggles work correctly
Homepage sections display as horizontal sliders with content cards
TV channels section on homepage opens stream modal with iframe
Games page clicking item navigates to /games/{id} detail page correctly
Profile page does NOT have themes section (correctly removed)
Profile page does NOT have 'Gerer mes messages' button (correctly removed)
Profile page has activation code input that validates against admin-generated codes
Menu Contenu does NOT contain Collections but has Musique and Jeux
VIP codes system working (POST generates code, GET lists codes)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix music detail page navigation - music items should navigate to /music/{id} detail pages like games do
